feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: UAE’s First Ever Mission to Mars Launched Oneindia Telugu

link.title: UAE’s First Ever Mission to Mars Launched Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
The United Arab Emirates launched its first-ever interplanetary Hope Probe mission to Mars from Japan’s Tanegashima Space Centre at 01:58 a.m. (local time) on Monday. "United Arab Emirates (UAE) launches its first mission to Mars, the Hope Mars Mission from Japans Tanegashima Space Center," UAE Space Agency said on its Twitter page.
#UAEmissiontoMars
#UnitedArabEmirates
#HopeMarsMission
#JapanTanegashimaSpaceCentre
#UAESpaceAgency
#Marsmission
#interplanetaryHopeProbemission
#GulfCountries
#అంగారక గ్రహం
#యునైటెడ్ అరబ్ ఎమిరేట్స్
అంగారక గ్రహంపై పరిశోధనలను సాగించడానికి మరో దేశం ముందడుగు వేసింది. మిషన్ టు మార్స్‌ను ప్రారంభించింది. అంగారకుడిపై పరిశోధనలను చేపట్టిన దేశాల జాబితాల సరసన చేరింది. అదే- యునైటెడ్ అరబ్ ఎమిరేట్స్. అత్యంత ప్రతిష్ఠాత్మకమైన, సంక్లిష్టమైన ఈ ప్రాజెక్టును చేపట్టిన తొలి గల్ఫ్ దేశంగా రికార్డును సృష్టించింది యూఏఈ. పరిశోధనలను కొనసాగిస్తోన్న కొద్దీ అద్భుతాలను అందిస్తోన్న మార్స్‌పై ప్రయోగాలకు శ్రీకారం చుట్టింది.
entry.summary: The United Arab Emirates launched its first-ever interplanetary Hope Probe mission to Mars from Japan’s Tanegashima Space Centre at 01:58 a.m. (local time) on Monday. "United Arab Emirates (UAE) launches its first mission to Mars, the Hope Mars Mission from Japans Tanegashima Space Center," UAE Space Agency said on its Twitter page. #UAEmissiontoMars #UnitedArabEmirates #HopeMarsMission #JapanTanegashimaSpaceCentre #UAESpaceAgency #Marsmission #interplanetaryHopeProbemission #GulfCountries #అంగారక గ్రహం #యునైటెడ్ అరబ్ ఎమిరేట్స్ అంగారక గ్రహంపై పరిశోధనలను సాగించడానికి మరో దేశం ముందడుగు వేసింది. మిషన్ టు మార్స్‌ను ప్రారంభించింది. అంగారకుడిపై పరిశోధనలను చేపట్టిన దేశాల జాబితాల సరసన చేరింది. అదే- యునైటెడ్ అరబ్ ఎమిరేట్స్. అత్యంత ప్రతిష్ఠాత్మకమైన, సంక్లిష్టమైన ఈ ప్రాజెక్టును చేపట్టిన తొలి గల్ఫ్ దేశంగా రికార్డును సృష్టించింది యూఏఈ. పరిశోధనలను కొనసాగిస్తోన్న కొద్దీ అద్భుతాలను అందిస్తోన్న మార్స్‌పై ప్రయోగాలకు శ్రీకారం చుట్టింది.

entry.title: The Walking Dead: World Beyond Trailer Deutsch German (2020)

link.title: The Walking Dead: World Beyond Trailer Deutsch German (2020)

entry.content:
The Walking Dead: World Beyond Trailer Deutsch German (OT: World Beyond - Season 1)
▶ Abonniere uns!
Alle Infos:
Like uns auf Facebook:
Folge uns auf Twitter:
Abonniere uns bei Instagram:
Nichts mehr verpassen mit unserem kostenlosen Messenger Abo:
Ganzer Film bei Amazon:
Im zweiten The Walking Dead-Ableger World Beyond wird die Geschichte der Kinder erzählt, die die Zeit vor der Zombie Apokalypse nicht miterlebt haben. Erster Trailer zur neuen Amazon Prime-Serie The Walking Dead: World Beyond.Inhalt: Auch nach dem Ausbruch der Zombie Apokalypse erblickten weitere Kinder das Licht der Erde. Im zweiten The Walking Dead-Ableger World Beyond wird ihre Geschichte weiter erzählt. Das Spin-off spielt im gleichen Universum wie die Mutterserie und Fear The Walking Dead, beschäftigt sich jedoch vorwiegend mit einer Gruppe von Teenagern, die die Zeit vor den Zombies nicht mehr miterlebt haben. Sie kennen die Geschichten, sind aber in einer Welt aufgewachsen, in der Zombies und Gefahren zum Alltag gehören.Schauspieler: Annet Mahendru, Aliyah Royale, Nico Tortorella, Joe Holt, Aaron Snyder, Nicolas Cantu, Christina Marie Karis, Paul D'Elia, Prabdeep Gill, Zach Ball, Hal Cumpston, Townsend Fallica
entry.summary: The Walking Dead: World Beyond Trailer Deutsch German (OT: World Beyond - Season 1) ▶ Abonniere uns! Alle Infos: Like uns auf Facebook: Folge uns auf Twitter: Abonniere uns bei Instagram: Nichts mehr verpassen mit unserem kostenlosen Messenger Abo: Ganzer Film bei Amazon: Im zweiten The Walking Dead-Ableger World Beyond wird die Geschichte der Kinder erzählt, die die Zeit vor der Zombie Apokalypse nicht miterlebt haben. Erster Trailer zur neuen Amazon Prime-Serie The Walking Dead: World Beyond.Inhalt: Auch nach dem Ausbruch der Zombie Apokalypse erblickten weitere Kinder das Licht der Erde. Im zweiten The Walking Dead-Ableger World Beyond wird ihre Geschichte weiter erzählt. Das Spin-off spielt im gleichen Universum wie die Mutterserie und Fear The Walking Dead, beschäftigt sich jedoch vorwiegend mit einer Gruppe von Teenagern, die die Zeit vor den Zombies nicht mehr miterlebt haben. Sie kennen die Geschichten, sind aber in einer Welt aufgewachsen, in der Zombies und Gefahren zum Alltag gehören.Schauspieler: Annet Mahendru, Aliyah Royale, Nico Tortorella, Joe Holt, Aaron Snyder, Nicolas Cantu, Christina Marie Karis, Paul D&#039;Elia, Prabdeep Gill, Zach Ball, Hal Cumpston, Townsend Fallica

entry.title: Rafale Fighter Jets: Manoj Tiwari says Rafale in India, Earthquake in Pak-China वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rafale Fighter Jets: Manoj Tiwari says Rafale in India, Earthquake in Pak-China वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Rafale, the world’s most dangerous fighter aircraft, has joined the Indian Air Force. Five fighter jets from France have reached India. Indian cricketers have also given their reaction by tweeting Rafael planes in India. Indian cricketer Manoj Tiwari has also written in the tweet that with Rafael’s arrival in India, there will be earthquake in neighboring countries.
दुनिया का सबसे खतरनाक लड़ाकू विमान राफेल भारतीय एयरफोर्स में शामिल हो गया है. फ्रांस से पांच लड़ाकू विमान राफेल भारत पहुंच गया है. अंबाला में राफेल विमानों की लैंडिग हुई है. पूरा भारत इस समय गर्व से सिर उठाकर पूरी दुनिया के सामने खड़ा है. ऐसे में भारतीय क्रिकेटरों ने भी ट्वीट कर राफेल विमानों की भारत में आने पर अपना रिएक्शन दिया है. भारतीय क्रिकेट मनोज तिवारी ने तो ट्वीट में ये बात भी लिख दी है कि राफेल के भारत में उतरने के साथ ही पड़ोसी देशों में भूकंप आ गया होगा।
#RafaleinIndia #ManojTiwari #IndianAirForce
entry.summary: Rafale, the world’s most dangerous fighter aircraft, has joined the Indian Air Force. Five fighter jets from France have reached India. Indian cricketers have also given their reaction by tweeting Rafael planes in India. Indian cricketer Manoj Tiwari has also written in the tweet that with Rafael’s arrival in India, there will be earthquake in neighboring countries. दुनिया का सबसे खतरनाक लड़ाकू विमान राफेल भारतीय एयरफोर्स में शामिल हो गया है. फ्रांस से पांच लड़ाकू विमान राफेल भारत पहुंच गया है. अंबाला में राफेल विमानों की लैंडिग हुई है. पूरा भारत इस समय गर्व से सिर उठाकर पूरी दुनिया के सामने खड़ा है. ऐसे में भारतीय क्रिकेटरों ने भी ट्वीट कर राफेल विमानों की भारत में आने पर अपना रिएक्शन दिया है. भारतीय क्रिकेट मनोज तिवारी ने तो ट्वीट में ये बात भी लिख दी है कि राफेल के भारत में उतरने के साथ ही पड़ोसी देशों में भूकंप आ गया होगा। #RafaleinIndia #ManojTiwari #IndianAirForce

entry.title: ITER: il progetto che fa sognare gli scienziati e promette una nuova fonte di energia pulita

entry.title: PECAH! Indra Jegel Bilang Maria Vania ‘Komodo’ Sekali - COMEDY LAB (PART 6)

link.title: PECAH! Indra Jegel Bilang Maria Vania ‘Komodo’ Sekali - COMEDY LAB (PART 6)

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Segmen Comedy Lab kali ini Boris Bokir, Gita Bhebhita, Maria Vania, dan Indra Jegel bermain game AKAP (Antar Kota Antar Provinsi).
Penasaran seperti apa permainannya? Yuk nonton video berikut ini.
______________________
KompasTV merilis sebuah program komedi baru untuk menemani penonton setia KompasTV, yaitu sebuah comedy show bersama para komika dengan mengeksplorasi Stand Up Comedy.
Suasana Comedy Lab bersifat chill dan intimate serta dengan suguhan komedi segar dan menghibur.
Penampilan Stand Up Comedy ini dilakukan oleh komika-komika Indonesia dengan didampingi oleh Host Gita Bhebita dan Boris Bokir.
Bintang tamu yang hadir pun selalu berbeda setiap episodenya.
Selanjutnya, variety show ini tayang setiap dua kali dalam seminggu dengan durasi satu jam.
Harapannya, Comedy Lab yang dikemas berbeda dengan eksplorasi bebas dari para komika dapat menjadi program hiburan alternatif yang dapat dinikmati bersama keluarga.
Jangan lupa untuk follow Instagram @comedylabkompastv dan jangan lupa subscribe channel YouTube Stand Up KompasTV ya!
#ComedyLab #SUCIKompasTV #IndraJegel
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Segmen Comedy Lab kali ini Boris Bokir, Gita Bhebhita, Maria Vania, dan Indra Jegel bermain game AKAP (Antar Kota Antar Provinsi). Penasaran seperti apa permainannya? Yuk nonton video berikut ini. ______________________ KompasTV merilis sebuah program komedi baru untuk menemani penonton setia KompasTV, yaitu sebuah comedy show bersama para komika dengan mengeksplorasi Stand Up Comedy. Suasana Comedy Lab bersifat chill dan intimate serta dengan suguhan komedi segar dan menghibur. Penampilan Stand Up Comedy ini dilakukan oleh komika-komika Indonesia dengan didampingi oleh Host Gita Bhebita dan Boris Bokir. Bintang tamu yang hadir pun selalu berbeda setiap episodenya. Selanjutnya, variety show ini tayang setiap dua kali dalam seminggu dengan durasi satu jam. Harapannya, Comedy Lab yang dikemas berbeda dengan eksplorasi bebas dari para komika dapat menjadi program hiburan alternatif yang dapat dinikmati bersama keluarga. Jangan lupa untuk follow Instagram @comedylabkompastv dan jangan lupa subscribe channel YouTube Stand Up KompasTV ya! #ComedyLab #SUCIKompasTV #IndraJegel

entry.title: Omer series Episode 10 complete in urdu & hindi language

link.title: Omer series Episode 10 complete in urdu & hindi language

entry.content: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.
entry.summary: Omar (Arabic: عُمَرْ‎) or Omar Farouk (Persian: عمر فاروق‎) is a historical[1][2] Arab television drama miniseries-serial that was produced and broadcast by MBC1 and directed by the Syrian director Hatem Ali.[3] Co-produced by Qatar TV, the series is based on the life of Omar ibn Al-Khattab, the second Caliph of Islam, and depicts his life from 18 years old until the moments of his death.[3] The series had to face large controversy[4][5][6][7][8][9][10] due to its depiction of Omar, Abu Bakr, Uthman and Ali, the four Rashidun Caliphs,[11] along with other characters, who some Muslims believe should not be depicted, much like Mohammad. The series consists of 31 episodes and was originally aired in the month of Ramadan since July 20, 2012.[12][13][14] It was made at a cost of 200 million Saudi riyals and filmed in Morocco, primarily in the cities of Marakesh, Tangiers, El Jadida, Casablanca and Mohammedia. After the series was broadcast on MBC, it was dubbed into several languages for international broadcast[15][16][17] and subtitled in English on YouTube; it received great support from many different scholarly bodies and people watching it.[18][19][20] As the series depended largely on reliable historical established facts, the series did not face criticism in terms of its content, as past films faced.

entry.title: Calls to Rename Alabama’s Edmund Pettus Bridge In Honor Of John Lewis

link.title: Calls to Rename Alabama’s Edmund Pettus Bridge In Honor Of John Lewis

entry.content: Many are calling to rename the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama after civil rights legend and U.S. Rep. John Lewis, who passed away on July 17 at the age of 80. Around 600 civil rights leaders marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge on March 7, 1965 on their way to the state capital in a protest for voting rights. Lewis was one of the civil rights leader present on what became known as “Bloody Sunday.”
entry.summary: Many are calling to rename the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama after civil rights legend and U.S. Rep. John Lewis, who passed away on July 17 at the age of 80. Around 600 civil rights leaders marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge on March 7, 1965 on their way to the state capital in a protest for voting rights. Lewis was one of the civil rights leader present on what became known as “Bloody Sunday.”

entry.title: Marine Le Pen accompagnée de son vice-président Jordan Bardella a dévoilé à la presse son ‘livre noir du coronavirus’, sous-titré ‘du fiasco à l’abîme’

link.title: Marine Le Pen accompagnée de son vice-président Jordan Bardella a dévoilé à la presse son ‘livre noir du coronavirus’, sous-titré ‘du fiasco à l’abîme’

entry.content:
Au siège du parti à Nanterre, Marine Le Pen accompagnée de son vice-président Jordan Bardella a dévoilé à la presse son "livre noir du coronavirus", sous-titré "du fiasco à l’abîme". L’initiative, évoquée par Marine Le Pen dès le mois de mai avant le début du déconfinement, entend pointer la responsabilité d’Emmanuel Macron et de son gouvernement dans la crise sanitaire.
Elle vient y dénoncer les "mensonges" d’un exécutif qui aurait sciemment dissimulé ce qu’il savait. L’accroche du livre est sans détour : "Ils savaient, ils ont menti, ils continuent de tâtonner dans le brouillard."
L’ouvrage, intitulé «Le livre noir du coronavirus : du fiasco à l’abîme», accuse Emmanuel Macron et son gouvernement d’errance stratégique dans la gestion de l’épidémie. Marine Le Pen réclame à nouveau la fermeture des frontières.
Pour l’heure, il n’y a pas de sortie en librairie prévue par le parti politique, qui préfère publier le document de 168 pages en ligne.
entry.summary: Au siège du parti à Nanterre, Marine Le Pen accompagnée de son vice-président Jordan Bardella a dévoilé à la presse son "livre noir du coronavirus", sous-titré "du fiasco à l’abîme". L’initiative, évoquée par Marine Le Pen dès le mois de mai avant le début du déconfinement, entend pointer la responsabilité d’Emmanuel Macron et de son gouvernement dans la crise sanitaire. Elle vient y dénoncer les "mensonges" d’un exécutif qui aurait sciemment dissimulé ce qu’il savait. L’accroche du livre est sans détour : "Ils savaient, ils ont menti, ils continuent de tâtonner dans le brouillard." L’ouvrage, intitulé «Le livre noir du coronavirus : du fiasco à l’abîme», accuse Emmanuel Macron et son gouvernement d’errance stratégique dans la gestion de l’épidémie. Marine Le Pen réclame à nouveau la fermeture des frontières. Pour l’heure, il n’y a pas de sortie en librairie prévue par le parti politique, qui préfère publier le document de 168 pages en ligne.

entry.title: Kanye West Bizarre Twitter Rant On Kim Kardashian And Kris Jenner

link.title: Kanye West Bizarre Twitter Rant On Kim Kardashian And Kris Jenner

entry.content:
"Apparently, Kanye West had a complete breakdown on Twitter when he engaged in a rant where he revealed that his wife Kim Kardashian was trying to get him locked up with a psychiatrist like Get Out. The 43-year-old rapper recently made headlines when conducting his first campaign rally for his presidential bid.
In Kanye’s series of tweets the rapper talked about a number of divisive topics that have now been deleted.
He also referenced the movie Get Out in one of the tweets, claiming his wife had a doctor ready to go to Wyoming to lock him up in what’s supposed to be a mental institution. Kanye ‘s fans didn’t take the rant lightly and raised questions about the mental health of the rapper. During his rant Kanye West had also posted the name of rapper Drake, which just raised more eyebrows.
Kanye fans used # PrayForYe to raise concerns about the situations which Kanye was going through. Kanye’s firestorm on Twitter comes just one day after his first presidential rally where he spoke about abortion and broke down in tears."
entry.summary: "Apparently, Kanye West had a complete breakdown on Twitter when he engaged in a rant where he revealed that his wife Kim Kardashian was trying to get him locked up with a psychiatrist like Get Out. The 43-year-old rapper recently made headlines when conducting his first campaign rally for his presidential bid. In Kanye’s series of tweets the rapper talked about a number of divisive topics that have now been deleted. He also referenced the movie Get Out in one of the tweets, claiming his wife had a doctor ready to go to Wyoming to lock him up in what’s supposed to be a mental institution. Kanye ‘s fans didn’t take the rant lightly and raised questions about the mental health of the rapper. During his rant Kanye West had also posted the name of rapper Drake, which just raised more eyebrows. Kanye fans used # PrayForYe to raise concerns about the situations which Kanye was going through. Kanye’s firestorm on Twitter comes just one day after his first presidential rally where he spoke about abortion and broke down in tears."

entry.title: Sturgeon: ‘no guarantees’ of quarantine free travel

link.title: Sturgeon: ‘no guarantees’ of quarantine free travel

entry.content: Scottish First Minister Nicola Sturgeon has reiterated that there "are no guarantees" airbridge arrangements between certain countries will continue as tourists and travellers have despaired at the reimposition of quarantine rules on those entering the UK from Spain. Report by Connerv. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at
entry.summary: Scottish First Minister Nicola Sturgeon has reiterated that there "are no guarantees" airbridge arrangements between certain countries will continue as tourists and travellers have despaired at the reimposition of quarantine rules on those entering the UK from Spain. Report by Connerv. Like us on Facebook at and follow us on Twitter at

entry.title: PSG - ASSE sur FIFA 20 : résumé et buts (finale de la Coupe de France)

link.title: PSG - ASSE sur FIFA 20 : résumé et buts (finale de la Coupe de France)

entry.content: Après plusieurs mois d’arrêt en raison de la pandémie du Covid-19, les compétitions officielles en France voit de nouveau le jour avec la finale de la Coupe de France entre le PSG et l’AS Saint-Etienne. Découvrez le résumé et les buts de cette simulation réalisée sur le jeu FIFA 20.
entry.summary: Après plusieurs mois d’arrêt en raison de la pandémie du Covid-19, les compétitions officielles en France voit de nouveau le jour avec la finale de la Coupe de France entre le PSG et l’AS Saint-Etienne. Découvrez le résumé et les buts de cette simulation réalisée sur le jeu FIFA 20.

entry.title: Australian player Ellyse Perry and Matt Toomua split after five years of marriage वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Australian player Ellyse Perry and Matt Toomua split after five years of marriage वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Australian cricket great Ellyse Perry and Rugby star Matt Toomua have announced an end to their marriage. Perry, who recently won the T20 World Cup, and Toomua went public in 2013 and tied the knot two years later. ‘It’s with the greatest of respect for one another that we decided to separate earlier this year,’ the pair said in a joint statement on Saturday. Speculation the private couple had split began were first fuelled in February when Perry attended the Australian Cricket Awards in Melbourne without her wedding ring.
एलिस पेरी, नाम तो सुना ही होगा. महिला क्रिकेट की सुपरस्टार है. और एलिस पेरी के फैंस के लिए बुरी खबर है. एलिस पेरी की निजी जिंदगी में इस वक्त उथल-पुथल है और उन्होंने तलाक लेने का फैसला किया है. खबर ये है कि अपने पति को उन्होंने तलाक देने का फैसला किया है. और ये फैसला दोनों ने मिलकर लिया है. एलिस पेरी के पति का नाम मैट तोमुआ है. और वो एक रग्बी प्लेयर है. टोमुआ और पैरी ने दिसंबर 2015 में शादी की थी. एलिस पैरी ऑस्ट्रेलिया की महिला क्रिकेट टीम के लिए खेलती हैं, जबकि टोमुआ रग्बी टीम मेलबर्न रेबल्स का प्रतिनिधित्व कर रहे हैं. दोनों के तलाक की खबरें भले ही चौंकाने वाली हैं, लेकिन इस साल फरवरी से ही दोनों के अलग होने की अफवाहें चल रही थीं.
#EllysePerry #MattToomua #Australia
entry.summary: Australian cricket great Ellyse Perry and Rugby star Matt Toomua have announced an end to their marriage. Perry, who recently won the T20 World Cup, and Toomua went public in 2013 and tied the knot two years later. ‘It’s with the greatest of respect for one another that we decided to separate earlier this year,’ the pair said in a joint statement on Saturday. Speculation the private couple had split began were first fuelled in February when Perry attended the Australian Cricket Awards in Melbourne without her wedding ring. एलिस पेरी, नाम तो सुना ही होगा. महिला क्रिकेट की सुपरस्टार है. और एलिस पेरी के फैंस के लिए बुरी खबर है. एलिस पेरी की निजी जिंदगी में इस वक्त उथल-पुथल है और उन्होंने तलाक लेने का फैसला किया है. खबर ये है कि अपने पति को उन्होंने तलाक देने का फैसला किया है. और ये फैसला दोनों ने मिलकर लिया है. एलिस पेरी के पति का नाम मैट तोमुआ है. और वो एक रग्बी प्लेयर है. टोमुआ और पैरी ने दिसंबर 2015 में शादी की थी. एलिस पैरी ऑस्ट्रेलिया की महिला क्रिकेट टीम के लिए खेलती हैं, जबकि टोमुआ रग्बी टीम मेलबर्न रेबल्स का प्रतिनिधित्व कर रहे हैं. दोनों के तलाक की खबरें भले ही चौंकाने वाली हैं, लेकिन इस साल फरवरी से ही दोनों के अलग होने की अफवाहें चल रही थीं. #EllysePerry #MattToomua #Australia

entry.title: Journal TV du 23 07 2020

link.title: Journal TV du 23 07 2020

entry.content: Bonjour à tous, l’Aston Martin Vanquish 25 par Ian Callum, une Lamborghini Aventador SVJ roadster limitée à 10 unités, relooking pour le Mini Countryman JCW et des compteurs numériques pour les Lotus, c’est notre sommaire du jour !

entry.title: IPL 2020: KKR Captain Dinesh Karthik on how he settled dispute with Andre Russell वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: IPL 2020: KKR Captain Dinesh Karthik on how he settled dispute with Andre Russell वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
KKR’s overdependence on the all-round abilities of West Indies Andre Russell was one of the major reasons for the team’s lacklustre showing along with a depleted pace attack.Speaking about the issue and how he later spoke to Russell about his problems, Karthik said that he had a man-to-man chat with the West Indian.
कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स कप्तान दिनेश कार्तिक ने कहा कि उन्होंने वेस्टइंडीज के हरफनमौला खिलाड़ी आंद्रे रसेल के साथ विवाद को सुलझाया है, जो नाइट राइडर्स की टीम के एक अहम खिलाड़ी हैं। 2019 में ऑलराउंडर आंद्रे रसेल ने टीम द्वारा लिए गए खराब फैसलों की शिकायत की थी, जिसका असर टीम के परिणाम पर पड़ा था।
#IPL2020 #DineshKarthik #AndreRussell
entry.summary: KKR’s overdependence on the all-round abilities of West Indies Andre Russell was one of the major reasons for the team’s lacklustre showing along with a depleted pace attack.Speaking about the issue and how he later spoke to Russell about his problems, Karthik said that he had a man-to-man chat with the West Indian. कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स कप्तान दिनेश कार्तिक ने कहा कि उन्होंने वेस्टइंडीज के हरफनमौला खिलाड़ी आंद्रे रसेल के साथ विवाद को सुलझाया है, जो नाइट राइडर्स की टीम के एक अहम खिलाड़ी हैं। 2019 में ऑलराउंडर आंद्रे रसेल ने टीम द्वारा लिए गए खराब फैसलों की शिकायत की थी, जिसका असर टीम के परिणाम पर पड़ा था। #IPL2020 #DineshKarthik #AndreRussell

entry.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 10) - Rodney Come Home - Part 2 - 1981

link.title: Only Fools And Horses (Special 10) - Rodney Come Home - Part 2 - 1981

entry.content:
Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold.
Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich.
After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald).
The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.
entry.summary: Only Fools and Horses…. is a British television sitcom created and written by John Sullivan. Seven series were originally broadcast on BBC One in the United Kingdom from 1981 to 1991, with sixteen sporadic Christmas specials aired until the end of the show in 2003. Episodes are regularly repeated on UKTV comedy channel Gold. Set in Peckham in south-east London, it stars David Jason as ambitious market trader Derek "Del Boy" Trotter, Nicholas Lyndhurst as his younger brother Rodney Trotter, and Lennard Pearce as their elderly Grandad as their sidekick. Backed by a strong supporting cast, the series follows the Trotters’ highs and lows in life, in particular their attempts to get rich. After Lennard Pearce’s death in 1984, the show introduced a new sidekick Uncle Albert, the boys’ great uncle played by Buster Merryfield. From 1988 onwards, the show features regular characters in Del Boy and Rodney’s love interests, Raquel (Tessa Peake-Jones) and Cassandra (Gwyneth Strong) respectively. Other recurring characters include haughty car dealer Boycie (John Challis), dim-witted road sweeper Trigger (Roger Lloyd-Pack), lorry driver Denzil (Paul Barber), obnoxious spiv Mickey Pearce (Patrick Murray) and bartender Mike (Kenneth MacDonald). The show achieved consistently high ratings, and the 1996 episode "Time on Our Hands" (originally billed as the last ever episode) holds the record for the highest UK audience for a sitcom episode, attracting over 24.3 million viewers. Critically and popularly acclaimed, the series received numerous awards, including recognition from BAFTA, the National Television Awards and the Royal Television Society, as well as winning individual accolades for both Sullivan and Jason. It was voted Britain’s Best Sitcom in a 2004 BBC poll. In a 2001 Channel 4 poll Del Boy was ranked fourth on their list of the 100 Greatest TV Characters. The series influenced British culture, contributing several words and phrases to the English language. It spawned an extensive range of merchandise, including books, videos, DVDs, toys, and board games.

entry.content:
Dance How To~!

Shall we go learn it?!
댄스 하우투~!

우리 배우러 갈까요?!

entry.title: Tourisme : le dispositif de chômage partiel prolongé

link.title: Tourisme : le dispositif de chômage partiel prolongé

entry.content:
C’est un soulagement pour les professionnels du tourisme durement touchés par la pandémie : le dispositif de chômage partiel sera prolongé jusqu’à la fin juillet pour le secteur./>
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Oscar Curse: Is it real? Does Oscar end careers in Bollywood? Oneindia News

link.title: Oscar Curse: Is it real? Does Oscar end careers in Bollywood? Oneindia News

entry.content:
What is called the Oscar curse was considered simply superstition. The so-called curse, aside, what is assured after an Oscar win is that its a gateway to better movies and a higher paycheck. However, in Bollywood it appears to be the reverse, as revelaed by acclaimed music composer AR Rahman and sound designer Resul Pookutty.This is the Bollywood version of the ‘Oscar curse’.
#Oscar #ARRahman #ResulPookutty
entry.summary: What is called the Oscar curse was considered simply superstition. The so-called curse, aside, what is assured after an Oscar win is that its a gateway to better movies and a higher paycheck. However, in Bollywood it appears to be the reverse, as revelaed by acclaimed music composer AR Rahman and sound designer Resul Pookutty.This is the Bollywood version of the ‘Oscar curse’. #Oscar #ARRahman #ResulPookutty

entry.title: Mehdiye Kerimi: Genç yaşta evlenmemek için Afganistan’dan kaçan Güzellik Kraliçesi adayı

link.title: Mehdiye Kerimi: Genç yaşta evlenmemek için Afganistan’dan kaçan Güzellik Kraliçesi adayı

entry.content: Dört yıldır Belçika’da yaşayan 19 yaşındaki Afganistanlı mülteci Mehdiye Kerimi ocak ayında gerçekleşecek ‘Miss Belgium 2021 Güzellik Yarışması’ adaylarından biri.
entry.summary: Dört yıldır Belçika’da yaşayan 19 yaşındaki Afganistanlı mülteci Mehdiye Kerimi ocak ayında gerçekleşecek ‘Miss Belgium 2021 Güzellik Yarışması’ adaylarından biri.

entry.title: India V China: భారత్ టార్గెట్ గా పావులుకదుపుతోన్నChina,Pak,Nepal,Afghanistan మంత్రులకు దిశానిర్దేశం!

link.title: India V China: భారత్ టార్గెట్ గా పావులుకదుపుతోన్నChina,Pak,Nepal,Afghanistan మంత్రులకు దిశానిర్దేశం!

entry.content:
భారత్ సైన్యంతో గల్వాన్ లోయ ఘటన తర్వాత మారిన పరిస్ధితుల్లో పొరుగుదేశాలను తమకు అనుకూలంగా మార్చుకునేందుకు చైనా విశ్వప్రయత్నాలు చేస్త్తోంది. ఇప్పటికే నేపాల్, భూటాన్ వంటి దేశాలపై ఒత్తిడి తెచ్చి సరిహద్దు వివాదాలను తెరపైకి తెచ్చేలా చేస్తున్న చైనా.. ఇప్పుడు ఏకంగా నేరుగా రంగంలోకి దిగుతోంది.
#China
#Nepal
#IndiaChinaFaceOff
#LadakhStandoff
#GalwanValley
#chinaindiaborder
#Ladakh
#IndiavsChina
#LAC
#XiJinping
#PMModi
entry.summary: భారత్ సైన్యంతో గల్వాన్ లోయ ఘటన తర్వాత మారిన పరిస్ధితుల్లో పొరుగుదేశాలను తమకు అనుకూలంగా మార్చుకునేందుకు చైనా విశ్వప్రయత్నాలు చేస్త్తోంది. ఇప్పటికే నేపాల్, భూటాన్ వంటి దేశాలపై ఒత్తిడి తెచ్చి సరిహద్దు వివాదాలను తెరపైకి తెచ్చేలా చేస్తున్న చైనా.. ఇప్పుడు ఏకంగా నేరుగా రంగంలోకి దిగుతోంది. #China #Nepal #IndiaChinaFaceOff #LadakhStandoff #GalwanValley #chinaindiaborder #Ladakh #IndiavsChina #LAC #XiJinping #PMModi
